data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Secure browser lockdown', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm the implementation of this feature. While the linked use case mentions that the secure browser launches and blocks other applications, there are no concrete details or evidence of how this is executed in the system. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement as the necessary validation was not performed.
gaps: No evidence of secure browser lockdown implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
